requirement_topic.en: ACONOQ Conformity Assessment Scope for Electrical Equipment Imports
requirement_topic.zh: ACONOQ电气设备进口合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: ACONOQ電氣設備進口合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: ACONOQ (Agence Congolaise de Normalisation et de la Qualité) is the national standards and quality body of the Republic of the Congo (Congo-Brazzaville). ACONOQ develops national standards and represents Congo-Brazzaville in regional and international standardization bodies. Imported electrical equipment may be subject to conformity assessment or technical verification by ACONOQ or customs authorities, consistent with the country's membership in OHADA (Organisation pour l'Harmonisation en Afrique du Droit des Affaires) and its IEC-aligned technical tradition. As of 2026-06-14, a confirmed mandatory conformity assessment route specifically for EV chargers through ACONOQ could not be verified from official published sources. The EV market in Congo-Brazzaville is essentially non-existent; the economy is primarily oil-based, private vehicle ownership is limited, and public charging infrastructure is absent. Exporters should contact ACONOQ directly to establish the applicable import conformity route for the specific product category and HS code.
summary.zh: ACONOQ（刚果标准和质量机构）是刚果共和国（刚果（布））的国家标准和质量机构。ACONOQ负责制定国家标准，并代表刚果（布）参与区域和国际标准化机构。进口电气设备可能须经ACONOQ或海关当局的合格评定或技术核查，与该国作为OHADA（非洲商业法协调组织）成员及其IEC体系技术传统一致。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方已发布来源确认通过ACONOQ针对电动汽车充电桩的具体强制合格评定路径。刚果（布）电动汽车市场基本不存在；该国经济以石油为主，私人车辆拥有率有限，公共充电基础设施缺失。出口商应直接联系ACONOQ，为具体产品类别和HS编码确定适用的进口合格评定路径。
summary.zht: ACONOQ（剛果標準和質量機構）是剛果共和國（剛果（布））的國家標準和質量機構。ACONOQ負責制定國家標準，並代表剛果（布）參與區域和國際標準化機構。進口電氣設備可能須經ACONOQ或海關當局的合格評定或技術核查，與該國作為OHADA（非洲商業法協調組織）成員及其IEC體系技術傳統一致。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方已發布來源確認通過ACONOQ針對電動汽車充電樁的具體強制合格評定路徑。剛果（布）電動汽車市場基本不存在；該國經濟以石油為主，私人車輛擁有率有限，公共充電基礎設施缺失。出口商應直接聯繫ACONOQ，為具體產品類別和HS編碼確定適用的進口合格評定路徑。

standards_or_laws: ACONOQ (Agence Congolaise de Normalisation et de la Qualité) — national standards and conformity body
OHADA — Organisation pour l'Harmonisation en Afrique du Droit des Affaires (regional commercial law harmonization)
ARSEL licensing requirements for electrical installation and operation
E2C grid-connection approval for generation and consumption installations
Congo-Brazzaville customs and import regulations (HS code determination required)

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence does not establish Congo-Brazzaville import conformity status and is not a substitute for ACONOQ or customs authority requirements. IEC-family test reports are more likely to be recognised in an ACONOQ review than GB-only documentation, given Congo-Brazzaville's IEC-aligned regulatory tradition.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据不能证明刚果（布）进口合格评定状态，也不能替代ACONOQ或海关当局的要求。鉴于刚果（布）的IEC体系监管传统，IEC体系测试报告比单纯GB文件在ACONOQ审查中更可能被认可。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據不能證明剛果（布）進口合格評定狀態，也不能替代ACONOQ或海關當局的要求。鑑於剛果（布）的IEC體系監管傳統，IEC體系測試報告比單純GB文件在ACONOQ審查中更可能被認可。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should: (1) contact ACONOQ directly to confirm whether a mandatory conformity assessment route exists for EV charger imports under the applicable HS code; (2) prepare IEC-family safety and EMC documentation as the most likely accepted technical evidence given Congo-Brazzaville's IEC/Francophone regulatory alignment; (3) confirm import duties, customs procedures, and any technical barrier requirements at the Brazzaville or Pointe-Noire port of entry; (4) engage ARSEL for electrical installation licensing and E2C for grid-connection approval before installation; (5) ensure French-language labelling and documentation as the official language of Congo-Brazzaville. The absence of an established EV charger market means standard import routes may not be fully defined, and direct regulatory engagement is required.
gap.zh: 出口商应：(1) 直接联系ACONOQ，确认适用HS编码下电动汽车充电桩进口是否存在强制合格评定路径；(2) 鉴于刚果（布）的IEC/法语区监管体系，准备IEC体系安全和EMC文件作为最可能被接受的技术证据；(3) 在布拉柴维尔或黑角入境口岸确认进口税、海关程序及任何技术性贸易壁垒要求；(4) 安装前向ARSEL申请电气安装许可，向E2C申请并网接入审批；(5) 确保标签和文件采用刚果（布）官方语言法语。由于尚无成熟的电动汽车充电桩市场，标准进口路径可能尚未完全确定，需直接与监管机构沟通。
gap.zht: 出口商應：(1) 直接聯繫ACONOQ，確認適用HS編碼下電動汽車充電樁進口是否存在強制合格評定路徑；(2) 鑑於剛果（布）的IEC/法語區監管體系，準備IEC體系安全和EMC文件作為最可能被接受的技術證據；(3) 在布拉薩維爾或黑角入境口岸確認進口稅、海關程序及任何技術性貿易壁壘要求；(4) 安裝前向ARSEL申請電氣安裝許可，向E2C申請併網接入審批；(5) 確保標籤和文件採用剛果（布）官方語言法語。由於尚無成熟的電動汽車充電樁市場，標準進口路徑可能尚未完全確定，需直接與監管機構溝通。

mandatory_status.target: Unconfirmed — no verified mandatory EV charger conformity assessment route through ACONOQ as of 2026-06-14; ARSEL licensing and E2C grid-connection approval are separately required for installation; French-language labelling is required as the official language
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence and CCC do not substitute for ACONOQ or Congo-Brazzaville import conformity requirements

source.publisher: ACONOQ — Agence Congolaise de Normalisation et de la Qualité, Republic of the Congo

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume automatic Congo-Brazzaville market access from China CCC or GB/T documentation alone. Contact ACONOQ to confirm the import conformity route for the specific product HS code. Prepare IEC-family technical documentation, French-language labelling, and engage ARSEL and E2C for installation licensing before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T文件认为可自动进入刚果（布）市场。应联系ACONOQ确认具体产品HS编码的进口合格评定路径。准备IEC体系技术文件、法语标签，并在出货前联系ARSEL和E2C办理安装许可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T文件認為可自動進入剛果（布）市場。應聯繫ACONOQ確認具體產品HS編碼的進口合格評定路徑。準備IEC體系技術文件、法語標籤，並在出貨前聯繫ARSEL和E2C辦理安裝許可。

requirement_topic.en: Congo-Brazzaville EV Market Context — Oil Economy, Nascent EV Adoption, and Infrastructure Absence
requirement_topic.zh: 刚果（布）电动汽车市场背景——石油经济、初萌的电动汽车采用与基础设施缺失
requirement_topic.zht: 剛果（布）電動汽車市場背景——石油經濟、初萌的電動汽車採用與基礎設施缺失

summary.en: Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo, capital Brazzaville — NOT the Democratic Republic of the Congo / DRC, capital Kinshasa) is a sub-Saharan oil-producing economy with a population of approximately 6 million. The economy is heavily dependent on petroleum exports and is served by limited national grid infrastructure, with significant portions of the country relying on off-grid or diesel generation. As of 2026, there is no established public EV charging network, no confirmed government EV policy or electromobility strategy, and no EV-specific import or conformity assessment framework. Private vehicle ownership is concentrated in Brazzaville and Pointe-Noire. The total EV fleet as of 2026 is negligible. Any EV charger deployment in Congo-Brazzaville as of 2026 would be a first-mover project, likely donor-funded (e.g., World Bank, AfDB, EU electromobility programmes in Francophone Africa) or driven by an industrial or hospitality installation with a captive fleet. Exporters should conduct full due diligence on the specific project sponsor, financing structure, and import pathway before committing to supply.
summary.zh: 刚果（布）（刚果共和国，首都布拉柴维尔——非刚果民主共和国/DRC，首都金沙萨）是撒哈拉以南石油生产经济体，人口约600万。该国经济高度依赖石油出口，全国电网基础设施有限，相当部分地区依赖离网或柴油发电。截至2026年，刚果（布）尚无已建立的公共电动汽车充电网络、未经证实的政府电动汽车政策或电动出行战略，以及针对电动汽车的进口或合格评定框架。私人车辆拥有集中在布拉柴维尔和黑角。截至2026年，全国电动汽车保有量可忽略不计。截至2026年，刚果（布）任何电动汽车充电桩部署都将是先行者项目，可能由捐助方资助（如世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟法语非洲电动出行项目）或由拥有自有车队的工业或酒店类安装驱动。出口商在承诺供货前，应对具体项目发起方、融资结构和进口路径进行充分尽职调查。
summary.zht: 剛果（布）（剛果共和國，首都布拉薩維爾——非剛果民主共和國/DRC，首都金沙薩）是撒哈拉以南石油生產經濟體，人口約600萬。該國經濟高度依賴石油出口，全國電網基礎設施有限，相當部分地區依賴離網或柴油發電。截至2026年，剛果（布）尚無已建立的公共電動汽車充電網絡、未經證實的政府電動汽車政策或電動出行戰略，以及針對電動汽車的進口或合格評定框架。私人車輛擁有集中在布拉薩維爾和黑角。截至2026年，全國電動汽車保有量可忽略不計。截至2026年，剛果（布）任何電動汽車充電樁部署都將是先行者項目，可能由捐助方資助（如世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟法語非洲電動出行項目）或由擁有自有車隊的工業或酒店類安裝驅動。出口商在承諾供貨前，應對具體項目發起方、融資結構和進口路徑進行充分盡職調查。

standards_or_laws: No confirmed national EV strategy or electromobility policy in Congo-Brazzaville as of 2026-06-14
ARSEL — sector regulator for any grid-connected electrical installation
E2C — state utility for grid supply connection
World Bank / AfDB electromobility programmes in Francophone sub-Saharan Africa (project-specific)

summary.en: China's national EV infrastructure expansion is governed by the New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan (2021–2035) and extensive domestic charging network policy. China's domestic EV push does not translate into automatic Congo-Brazzaville market access or readiness; Chinese manufacturers must separately satisfy any Congo-Brazzaville import conformity, connector, grid-connection, and project requirements. The absence of an established EV market in Congo-Brazzaville means demand must be project-created rather than pulled from an existing fleet.
summary.zh: 中国国家电动汽车基础设施扩张由《新能源汽车产业发展规划（2021—2035年）》及广泛的国内充电网络政策管理。中国国内电动汽车推广不能自动转换为刚果（布）市场准入或就绪；中国制造商仍须单独满足刚果（布）的进口合格评定、接口、并网接入和项目要求。刚果（布）尚无成熟电动汽车市场，意味着需求须通过具体项目创造，而非从现有车队拉动。
summary.zht: 中國國家電動汽車基礎設施擴張由《新能源汽車產業發展規劃（2021—2035年）》及廣泛的國內充電網絡政策管理。中國國內電動汽車推廣不能自動轉換為剛果（布）市場准入或就緒；中國製造商仍須單獨滿足剛果（布）的進口合格評定、接口、併網接入和項目要求。剛果（布）尚無成熟電動汽車市場，意味著需求須通過具體項目創造，而非從現有車隊拉動。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Congo-Brazzaville represents a near-zero EV market as of 2026 with no established charging infrastructure, no national EV policy, and no defined conformity assessment route for EV charger imports. Any project is a first-mover deployment. Exporters must identify and verify: (1) the specific project sponsor and procurement specification; (2) financing source (government budget, donor, private developer, industrial); (3) import pathway and HS code classification with Congolese customs; (4) ARSEL licensing and E2C grid-connection approval; (5) IEC connector (Type 2 / CCS2) and safety documentation requirements; (6) French-language documentation requirements; (7) after-sales support and spare-parts logistics for a remote market. Do not confuse Congo-Brazzaville with the DRC — they are separate countries with separate regulatory bodies.
gap.zh: 截至2026年，刚果（布）电动汽车市场几乎为零，无充电基础设施、无国家电动汽车政策、无电动汽车充电桩进口合格评定路径。任何项目都是先行者部署。出口商须识别并核实：(1) 具体项目发起方和采购规范；(2) 资金来源（政府预算、捐助方、私人开发商、工业方）；(3) 与刚果海关确认进口路径和HS编码分类；(4) ARSEL许可证和E2C并网接入审批；(5) IEC接口（Type 2 / CCS2）和安全文件要求；(6) 法语文件要求；(7) 偏远市场的售后支持和备件物流。请勿将刚果（布）与刚果民主共和国混淆——两者是拥有独立监管机构的不同国家。
gap.zht: 截至2026年，剛果（布）電動汽車市場幾乎為零，無充電基礎設施、無國家電動汽車政策、無電動汽車充電樁進口合格評定路徑。任何項目都是先行者部署。出口商須識別並核實：(1) 具體項目發起方和採購規範；(2) 資金來源（政府預算、捐助方、私人開發商、工業方）；(3) 與剛果海關確認進口路徑和HS編碼分類；(4) ARSEL許可證和E2C併網接入審批；(5) IEC接口（Type 2 / CCS2）和安全文件要求；(6) 法語文件要求；(7) 偏遠市場的售後支持和備件物流。請勿將剛果（布）與剛果民主共和國混淆——兩者是擁有獨立監管機構的不同國家。

mandatory_status.target: Market context — Congo-Brazzaville has no established EV charger regulatory framework as of 2026; project-level compliance with ARSEL and E2C is required for any installation; French-language documentation is required
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV policy and domestic volumes do not affect Congo-Brazzaville project conformity obligations or market entry requirements

source.publisher: ARSEL — Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Électricité, Republic of the Congo

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Congo-Brazzaville is a near-zero EV market as of 2026 with no public charging infrastructure, no national EV policy, and no established EV charger import conformity route. Any project is a first-mover deployment. Verify project sponsor, financing, ARSEL/E2C approvals, IEC connector compliance, and French-language documentation before shipment. Do NOT confuse Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo) with the DRC (Democratic Republic of the Congo) — they are different countries.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年，刚果（布）电动汽车市场几乎为零，无公共充电基础设施、无国家电动汽车政策、无已建立的充电桩进口合格评定路径。任何项目都是先行者部署。出货前须核实项目发起方、融资、ARSEL/E2C审批、IEC接口合规性及法语文件。请勿将刚果（布）（刚果共和国）与刚果民主共和国（DRC）混淆——两者是不同国家。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年，剛果（布）電動汽車市場幾乎為零，無公共充電基礎設施、無國家電動汽車政策、無已建立的充電樁進口合格評定路徑。任何項目都是先行者部署。出貨前須核實項目發起方、融資、ARSEL/E2C審批、IEC接口合規性及法語文件。請勿將剛果（布）（剛果共和國）與剛果民主共和國（DRC）混淆——兩者是不同國家。
